reasoning: A better enables a correct answer because it contains an explicit statement from MacroTrends that the latest closing stock price for PSKY as of July 17, 2026 is 8.75. Although A also includes live intraday quotes and some noisy snippets, an LLM can still extract the closing answer correctly. In contrast, B mainly offers incomplete or stale snippets: Yahoo references the existence of close data but does not show the latest close value; CNN only gives relative movement from the last close; MSN cites 9.25 as current price, which is not the latest close in the anchor.
